name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BraceForImpactHelper.SnapImpact
summary: Exaggeration amount of the initial impact (legs).  +ve fold with car impact (as if pushed at hips in the car velocity direction).  -ve fold away from car impact.
remarks:
Default value = 7.0f.
            Min value = -20.0f.
            Max value = 20.0f.
